hero.title: INT-AIBOX-P-8
hero.description: High-performance, low-power edge computing device with 7.2 TOPS INT8 AI computing power. Process 8 channels of HD video simultaneously with 40+ built-in AI algorithms.

features.title: Why INT-AIBOX-P-8
features.subtitle: A compact, powerful edge AI device designed for intelligent video surveillance and analytics across diverse environments.

items.title: Ultra-High Performance Computing
items.description: Powered by domestic TPU CV186AH with 7.2 TOPS INT8 peak computing power. Supports 8-channel H.264/H.265 1080P@30fps hardware encoding and decoding.

items.title: Rich Built-in AI Algorithms
items.description: 40+ pre-loaded algorithms covering smoke/fire detection, safety helmet, face recognition, license plate recognition, intrusion detection, and more. Up to 8 AI tasks per channel.

items.title: Versatile Interfaces
items.description: Dual Gigabit Ethernet, HDMI 2.0 (4K@60fps), USB 3.0 ×2, RS-485, RS-232, CAN bus, GPIO, SATA 3.0, microSD, and optional 4G/5G & Wi-Fi/BT connectivity.

items.title: Industrial-Grade Reliability
items.description: Fanless passive cooling, -20°C to +60°C wide operating temperature, IP41 protection rating. Supports desktop, wall-mount, 19" rack, and outdoor enclosure installation.

items.title: Docker & AI Frameworks
items.description: SophonSDK toolchain with support for Caffe, TensorFlow, PyTorch, ONNX, PaddlePaddle and more. Docker containerization for rapid algorithm deployment.

items.title: Secure & Encrypted
items.description: Programmable encryption chip for privacy protection. High-capacity eMMC with primary/backup partitions. Fault alarm and protection mechanisms built-in.

scenarios.title: Application Scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Ready-to-deploy AI analytics for diverse industry verticals. Custom algorithm combinations available with 40+ algorithms to choose from.

items.name: Smart Community
items.description: Enhance residential security with people/vehicle monitoring, access control, and perimeter intrusion detection.

items.name: Smart Gas Station
items.description: Ensure safety compliance with smoking detection, phone usage alerts, fire hazard monitoring, and more.

items.name: Smart Construction
items.description: Construction site safety monitoring with worker PPE compliance, climbing detection, and equipment tracking.

items.name: Smart Park / Campus
items.description: Protect public areas with perimeter security, people counting, and behavioral analytics.

items.name: Liquor & Retail Safety
items.description: Monitor store operations including customer flow, safety compliance, and theft prevention.

items.name: Waste & Environmental
items.description: Environmental monitoring for waste management, illegal dumping detection, and sanitation compliance.

cases.title: Real-World Deployments
cases.subtitle: See the INT-AIBOX in action across diverse industries with live AI analytics and real-time alert systems.

items.title: Construction Site Monitoring
items.description: AI-powered perimeter detection and safety monitoring at construction sites. Real-time alerts for unauthorized entry and safety violations.

items.title: Restricted Zone Access Control
items.description: Automated detection of personnel entering restricted areas with instant alert notifications and evidence capture.

items.title: Logistics & Warehouse Security
items.description: Intelligent monitoring of loading docks and warehouse areas with vehicle and personnel tracking alerts.

items.title: Aquaculture Monitoring
items.description: 24/7 automated surveillance of aquaculture facilities with intrusion detection and environmental monitoring.

items.title: Mining Safety
items.description: Underground mining safety monitoring with worker detection, PPE compliance, and hazard alerts in challenging environments.

views.label: 3D View
views.description: Compact fanless design with heatsink fins for passive cooling

views.label: Front Panel
views.description: SSD/STAT/PWR LEDs, LAN/WAN ports, HDMI, USB 3.0, Type-C, microSD, SIM card slot

platform.title: Intelligent AI Management Platform
platform.subtitle: Built-in web-based management platform with visualization dashboard, real-time alerts, and comprehensive device management — all accessible via browser.
platform.dashboardCaption: Real-time visualization dashboard with map-based device overview, alert statistics, and AI analytics.
platform.archCaption: System architecture: Connect existing cameras (SDC, IPC, NVR) to edge AI box for real-time intelligent analysis.

modules.name: Smart Monitoring
modules.description: Real-time video preview with map-based device overview, system resource monitoring, and alert statistics.

modules.name: Visualization Mode
modules.description: Full-screen data visualization with live AI video analysis, device status, and alarm trends.

modules.name: Alert Center
modules.description: Centralized alarm management for behavior analysis, vehicle alerts, and personnel alerts with evidence.

modules.name: Intelligent Analysis
modules.description: Structured data for personnel and vehicle attributes with search and filtering capabilities.

modules.name: Device Management
modules.description: Cascade multiple edge boxes, connect smart cameras, legacy cameras, and IoT devices.

modules.name: System Management
modules.description: Network configuration, algorithm updates, platform upgrades, and maintenance tools.

platform.apiSubtitle: Rich northbound APIs to integrate with your existing business platforms and upper-layer applications.

cta.title: Ready to Deploy Edge AI?
cta.subtitle: Contact our sales team for pricing, bulk orders, or custom algorithm requirements. We offer exclusive global distribution through Sienovo.

footer.tagline: Exclusive global distributor for intelligent edge AI computing solutions. Empowering industries with next-generation video analytics.
footer.newsletterDesc: Get the latest edge AI insights, product updates, and technical articles delivered to your inbox every week.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.subtitle: {count} files — sync from Google Drive or upload directly
